author: Live A Quiet Life
description: Academic assignment and lecture tracker. Always know where you are. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: LiveAQuietLife
manifest.description: Academic assignment and lecture tracker. Always know where you are.
manifest.name: Hold Course

name: Hold Course

releases.author: LiveAQuietLife
releases.description:
### New Features
- **Course page URL**: Optional URL field on each class. Renders as a quiet external-link icon on dashboard cards and as a "Course page" link in the Class view header. No migration required; existing classes without the field are unaffected.
- **"Add a lecture" command**: New command palette entry. Opens the Add Lecture modal against the current class. Requires an active semester and an open class screen; shows a notice otherwise.
- **"Add an assignment" command**:  New command palette entry. Opens the Add Assignment modal against the current class. Same guards as the lecture command.

### Bug Fixes
- **Due-today items disappearing in the evening**: Items due today would vanish from the Today sidebar and Overview strip after 8 PM for users in negative UTC offset time zones (e.g. US Eastern).

releases.author: LiveAQuietLife
releases.description:
Hold Course 1.0.0
Academic course and assignment tracker for Obsidian.
Track classes, lectures, assignments, exams, and library resources across semesters. Includes a Today sidebar, global assignments view, calendar, and command palette shortcuts — all in a single desktop plugin.
